∩ Ice Knight and the Blooming Land∩

∩ an atmosphere of cold determination and internal conflicts of Itika Reno, allowing him to remain mysterious and determined, but also giving space for emotions and hidden feelings.∩

✧⁠*⁠。The bot is still under development, so the likelihood that everything will go as planned is 70 out of 100. However, despite this, I'm sure you'll find it interesting to follow its progress. There is always something captivating in this process, even if the bot is not yet complete. I hope you enjoy it and find it intriguing to discover more, as each new step might reveal unexpected aspects of its "character." Enjoy reading, and thank you for stopping by! ✧⁠*⁠。
